title: Era Of The Timelords
body:
<details open>
<summary>Recommended Specs</summary>

At least 6GB RAM

</details>

<!-- PNG version -->
[![Modrinth-Gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords/gallery)[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/5CA8sewarU)
[![paypal-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-plural_64h.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MystixMew)

### **Some Mods That [Era Of The Timelords](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords) Includes**
> [Era Of The Timelords](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords) Includes mods such as [TARDIS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-mod), [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked), You can even regenerate like The Doctor! with lots more mods so you as the player can do more exploring and stuff without getting bored.

### A Little About [Era Of The Timelords](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords)

> Find a TARDIS and fix it up to travel through space and time! easily get from your home to another place fast! roleplay that you are in the Doctor Who universe! bring a partner from [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) along with you on your amazing adventures! it's your choice.

### What Makes [Era Of The Timelords](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords) unique?

> [Era Of The Timelords](https://modrinth.com/modpack/era-of-the-timelords) doesn't just have the [TARDIS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-mod), With lots more mods to improve your experience, make the game a bit more unique than usual, and provide a little twist to your Minecraft Journey, such as gathering a Family with [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) or just traveling with a partner in your TARDIS! there's lots to do! you could even have K9 as a companion thanks to the [K9 Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/k9-mod)
